concerns.text: FR-005 and SC-001/SC-002 explicitly require fitting regression on the 'four baseline metrics' (Global Efficiency, Modularity, FPN Strength, DMN Strength). Tasks T027 and T028 implement PCA dimensionality reduction on these metrics before regression. This changes the predictors from the specific four metrics defined in the spec to PCA components, meaning no task exists to implement the specific hypothesis test required by FR-005.

FR-002 and Constitution Principle VII mandate exclusion of participants with mean FD > 3.0 mm. Tasks T014 and T019 implement filtering at 0.3 mm. While the plan notes this as a 'correction', the tasks do not implement the spec's explicit 3.0 mm threshold, leaving the spec requirement unimplemented.

FR-001 mandates downloading dataset 'ds000277'. Task T005 implements fetching 'ds000278'. While the plan justifies this switch, there is no task that explicitly addresses the requirement to download 'ds000277' or formally documents the deviation from FR-001 in the task list, creating a traceability gap for the original requirement.

SC-003 requires the system to document the 'achieved power' (which may be <0.80) in the output file. Task T015 calculates power but the description focuses on the calculation logic. There is no explicit task ensuring the output file `data/results/power_analysis.txt` contains the specific 'achieved power' value as a mandatory artifact, distinct from just running the calculation.
